title: iochroma nitidum
intro: Iochroma nitidum, also known as the purple flower tree or the purple angel trumpet, is a flowering plant native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Iochroma nitidum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Iochroma nitidum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a natural dye for textiles and cosmetics.
